subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-11-13
subcodes.first_line: As they were delivered in scientific terms and with rational arguments, none could deny them and not a single voice was raised in opposition.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون باصطلاحات علمی و براهین عقلی بود منکری نداشت و هیچ نفسی ادنی اعتراضی ننمود البته در اینگونه محافل
subcodes.subjects: @harmony of science and religion, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @empty learning; false spirituality, @rational arguments, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @changing and unchanging parts of religion
